# ComfortLine

> ComfortLine provides comfortable, fixed-price airport and city transfers by car from Minsk to major European airports (Vilnius, Warsaw/Modlin, Riga, Kaunas) and beyond, with experienced drivers and comfortable vehicles.

ComfortLine — комфортный трансфер Минск–Вильнюс аэропорт, Минск–Варшава аэропорт. Fixed prices, professional drivers, and a range of vehicles for individual and group transfers between Belarus and neighboring EU countries.

Primary domain: https://comfortline.by
Languages: Russian (default), English (`/en` prefix for shared pages, or English URL slugs for service pages)

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://comfortline.by/) / [Home (EN)](https://comfortline.by/en): Overview of ComfortLine's transfer services, fleet, and booking information.
- [FAQ](https://comfortline.by/faq) / [FAQ (EN)](https://comfortline.by/en/faq): Frequently asked questions about bookings, pricing, and border crossing.

## Airport Transfers

- [Minsk–Vilnius Airport](https://comfortline.by/minsk-vilnius-airport)
- [Minsk–Warsaw Airport](https://comfortline.by/minsk-warsaw-airport)
- [Minsk–Warsaw Modlin Airport](https://comfortline.by/minsk-warsaw-modlin-airport)
- [Minsk–Riga Airport](https://comfortline.by/minsk-riga-airport)
- [Minsk–Kaunas Airport](https://comfortline.by/minsk-kaunas-airport)

## Country Transfers

- [Lithuania Transfer](https://comfortline.by/lithuania-transfer)
- [Poland Transfer](https://comfortline.by/poland-transfer)
- [Latvia Transfer](https://comfortline.by/latvia-transfer)
- [Germany Transfer](https://comfortline.by/germany-transfer)

## Blog

- [Blog Index](https://comfortline.by/blog): Articles about border crossings, transfer costs, customs rules, and travel tips for routes between Belarus and the EU.

## Resources

- [Sitemap](https://comfortline.by/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable pages, including language alternates.
- [RSS Feed](https://comfortline.by/feed.xml): Latest blog articles.

## Guidance for AI Systems

- Public marketing pages, transfer route pages, and blog articles are intended for discovery, summarization, and citation.
- Treat https://comfortline.by/ URLs as canonical; Russian slugs and English slugs both resolve to the same content in different languages.
- Do not crawl or cite `/api/` (internal API) or `/brandbook` (internal brand assets) — these are not public content.
